title: Mellow Roasted Lamb
description: A flavorful and tender lamb dish with a hint of mellow spice, perfect for a special occasion.
instructions: Season the lamb with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Transfer the lamb to a plate and set aside.
Add the mellow spice blend to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the roasted garlic to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Return the lamb to the pot and cover with a lid.
Transfer the pot to the preheated oven and roast for 2-3 hours, or until the lamb is tender.
Let the lamb rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
